positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a cosmic woodland scene. A group of ethereal bioluminescent flora, including large, stylized mushrooms and delicate ferns, populate the foreground. The centerpiece is a trio of stylized, stylized forest spirits with flowing, simplified silhouettes, looking gently into the distance. The sky is a deep indigo gradient transitioning to soft magenta near the horizon. The overall style is modern abstract gothic, utilizing thick, clean lines and strong, contrasting colors (neon aqua, vivid purple, deep teal). Focus on clean outlines and graphic composition. Flat design sensibility with subtle depth. High contrast, suitable for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, signature, logo, messy, ugly, poor anatomy, extra limbs, noise, grain, low detail, 3d render, realistic photography
